visual: Side-stepping laterally while the hands trace continuous circles in front of the torso, one rising as the other falls, waist rotating smoothly.
motion_description: The person performs a slow, continuous lateral stepping motion, repeatedly narrowing and widening their stance as they shift weight from one leg to the other. The torso rotates smoothly side to side, turning approximately 45 degrees in sync with the weight transfer. The arms trace continuous, alternating circles: one sweeps across at face height with the palm inward, while the other simultaneously sweeps at waist level with the palm downward. As the body reaches the end of each rotation, the arms switch their upper and lower positions, maintaining a steady, unbroken flow throughout.
